title: Validate Tradeline Extraction Pipeline Against Ground Truth Test Data

requirements: Extract tradelines from actual test PDF: backend/TransUnion-06-10-2025.pdf
Compare extracted results against ground truth: backend/tradeline_test_rows.sql (20 expected records)
Achieve 100% field match on critical fields: creditor_name, account_number, account_status, account_type
Achieve 95%+ field match on optional fields: monthly_payment, credit_limit, date_opened
Generate detailed comparison report identifying any extraction failures or mismatches
acceptance: PDF processed successfully: verify pipeline completes without errors
100% match on creditor_name: verify all 20 creditor names match ground truth exactly
100% match on account_number: verify all 20 account numbers match (including masking)
100% match on account_type: verify all 16 Revolving + 4 Installment correctly classified
100% match on account_status: verify all 13 Current + 7 Closed correctly identified
95%+ match on account_balance: verify at least 19/20 balance amounts match
95%+ match on credit_limit: verify at least 11/12 non-null limits match (8 are null)
95%+ match on monthly_payment: verify at least 12/13 non-null payments match (7 are null)
95%+ match on date_opened: verify at least 18/19 dates match (1 is null)
Comparison report generated: verify file exists at backend/tests/reports/extraction_validation_report.json

artifacts.usage: Source PDF containing 20 tradelines to extract
artifacts.contains: Real TransUnion credit report with known tradelines

artifacts.usage: Expected extraction results - 20 tradeline records with all fields populated correctly
artifacts.contains: SQL INSERT with 20 records: creditor_name, account_number, account_type, account_status, account_balance, credit_limit, monthly_payment, date_opened, credit_bureau, is_negative

pre_analysis.action: Verify test PDF and ground truth SQL file exist
Parse tradeline_test_rows.sql to extract expected values

implementation_approach.title: Parse ground truth data from SQL file
implementation_approach.description: Extract expected tradeline data from tradeline_test_rows.sql to use as comparison baseline
modification_points: Parse SQL INSERT statement to extract 20 tradeline records
Extract all 10 fields per record: creditor_name, account_number, account_type, account_status, account_balance, credit_limit, monthly_payment, date_opened, credit_bureau, is_negative
Store in structured format (list of dicts) for comparison
Normalize field values to match extraction output format (remove quotes, handle nulls)
Create index mapping: use account_number as unique key for matching
logic_flow: - Extract column names from first part: ("credit_bureau", "creditor_name", ...)
- Split on '), (' to get individual records
Convert each row into dict with column names as keys
Store as ground_truth_records for later comparison

implementation_approach.title: Create extraction validation test
implementation_approach.description: Build pytest test that runs extraction pipeline and compares against ground truth
modification_points: Create new test file: backend/tests/test_extraction_validation.py
Implement test_extract_transunion_pdf_matches_ground_truth() test function
Load ground truth from tradeline_test_rows.sql (step 1 output)
Run TradelineExtractionPipeline.process_credit_report() on TransUnion-06-10-2025.pdf
Compare extracted tradelines against ground truth field-by-field
Generate detailed comparison report with match/mismatch details
logic_flow: Import dependencies: pytest, TradelineExtractionPipeline, ground_truth parser
- Return list of 20 expected tradeline dicts
- Match with ground truth by account_number
- 100% on critical fields (creditor_name, account_number, account_type, account_status)
Add helper function compare_field(extracted, expected, field_name):

implementation_approach.title: Run extraction and generate comparison report
implementation_approach.description: Execute extraction pipeline on test PDF and generate detailed field-by-field comparison report
modification_points: Run pytest test: pytest backend/tests/test_extraction_validation.py -v -s
Capture extraction results and ground truth comparison
Generate JSON comparison report at backend/tests/reports/extraction_validation_report.json
Include: overall accuracy, per-field accuracy, mismatch details, error analysis
logic_flow: Verify extraction succeeded: assert result.success == True
- Add to mismatches list with details

implementation_approach.title: Analyze extraction failures and generate recommendations
implementation_approach.description: Analyze any mismatches or errors to identify root causes and recommend fixes
modification_points: Review comparison_report.mismatches for patterns
Categorize errors by type: OCR errors, field mapping issues, parsing logic bugs, null handling
Generate recommendations for each error category
Create action items for fixing identified issues
Update comparison report with error analysis and recommendations
logic_flow: - Null handling issues? (null vs empty string)
- OCR errors → Enhance OCR correction patterns
- Parsing logic → Fix parser in real_world_parser.py
- Null handling → Update validation in validation_pipeline.py
'description': 'Currency amounts misread due to OCR errors',
'action': 'Add OCR correction rules for $ and comma characters',

implementation_approach.title: Generate validation summary and acceptance report
implementation_approach.description: Create final validation summary showing pass/fail status for all acceptance criteria
modification_points: Check all 11 acceptance criteria against comparison_report
Generate pass/fail status for each criterion
Create summary report: backend/tests/reports/validation_summary.md
Include: overall status, detailed results, recommendations, next steps
logic_flow: - Check if met based on comparison_report data
- If fail: record actual vs expected values
- If only optional criteria fail: 'PARTIAL PASS ⚠️'
